sn35.124:1.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Vesalī in the Great Wood in the Hall with the Peaked Roof. Then the householder Ugga of Vesalī approached the Blessed One … and said to him….[n.113] At AN I 26,11 he is declared the foremost male lay disciple among those who offer agreeable things (etadagganaṁ manāpadāyakānaṃ); see too AN IV 208–12.
sn35.124:1.2: The question and the reply are exactly the same as in §118.
